dataset.deposit_liquidity_report_lines.name: deposit_liquidity_report_lines
dataset.deposit_liquidity_report_lines.description: Prepared deposit liquidity report line records at account and reporting-date grain, carrying normalized depositor, product, balance, runoff, insured amount, and stable funding fields consumed by reporting logic.

fields.name: account_id
fields.description: Account identifier reported on the deposit liquidity line.

fields.name: as_of_date
fields.description: Reporting date carried on the deposit liquidity line.

fields.name: customer_id
fields.description: Depositor identifier reported for account ownership and aggregation.

fields.name: product_id
fields.description: Deposit product identifier reported for product-class aggregation.

fields.name: balance_amount
fields.description: Deposit balance amount reported for liquidity measurement.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency code reported for the deposit balance amount.

fields.name: liquidity_bucket
fields.description: Liquidity bucket reported for regulatory classification.

fields.name: runoff_rate
fields.description: Runoff rate reported after applying account override or product standard rate.

fields.name: stable_funding_amount
fields.description: Calculated stable funding amount reported after applying the runoff or stability rate.

fields.name: insured_balance_amount

dialects.expression: CASE WHEN deposit_accounts.balance_amount <= deposit_products.insurance_limit_amount THEN deposit_accounts.balance_amount ELSE deposit_products.insurance_limit_amount END

fields.description: Insured portion of the deposit balance reported under the product insurance limit.

custom_extensions.data:
{"name": "physical_source", "kind": "query", "description": "Prepared report-line dataset is produced by a documented query that joins account balances, depositor master data, and deposit product parameters before reporting.", "sql": "select account_id, as_of_date, customer_id, product_id, balance_amount, currency, liquidity_bucket, runoff_rate, stable_funding_amount, insured_balance_amount
from liquidity_risk_engine.deposit_liquidity_report_lines
where as_of_date = :as_of_date
", "depends_on": ["core_deposit.deposit_accounts", "customer_master.deposit_customers", "product_master.deposit_products"]}

columns.description: Deposit product type such as current account, savings, term deposit, or brokered deposit.

columns.name: regulatory_class
columns.description: Regulatory liquidity class assigned to the deposit product.

columns.name: standard_runoff_rate
columns.description: Standard runoff or stability rate assigned by product policy.

columns.name: insurance_limit_amount
columns.description: Maximum insured balance amount applicable to the deposit product.

requirement.item_cb03a7baa9.name: 存款流动性稳定资金报送需求
requirement.item_cb03a7baa9.description: 监管/BRD要求按日生成账户级存款流动性稳定资金报送数据，用于说明每个存款账户在报告日的客户、产品、余额、币种、流动性分组、流失率、受保存款金额和稳定资金金额口径。需求还要求日终前完成数据生成、资金部门复核、异常说明和报送留痕；这些非数据类要求保留在说明中，不强行建模为字段。
requirement.item_cb03a7baa9.source: Deposit Liquidity Reporting BRD v1.0 section 4.1
requirement.item_cb03a7baa9.SLA: Daily EOD before 20:30 local time; treasury liquidity review completed before regulatory submission.

concepts.name: DepositAccount
concepts.description: 需求需要 DepositAccount 作为存款流动性报送的核心语义对象，用于表达每个账户在报告日的余额、币种、流动性分组和稳定资金金额口径。

concepts.name: Depositor
concepts.description: 需求需要 Depositor 作为持有存款账户的客户或法律实体语义对象，用于按客户分组、归属和辖区解释存款余额。

concepts.name: DepositProduct
concepts.description: 需求需要 DepositProduct 作为存款产品语义对象，用于说明产品监管分类、标准流失率和保险限额。

required_fields.name: 账户标识
required_fields.description: 需求需要账户标识，用于唯一识别每条存款报送记录并支持账户级对账。

required_fields.name: 报告日期
required_fields.description: 需求需要报告日期，用于确定存款余额和流动性指标所属的监管报告日。

required_fields.name: 客户标识
required_fields.description: 需求需要客户标识，用于将存款账户归属到持有该存款的客户或法律实体。

required_fields.name: 产品标识
required_fields.description: 需求需要产品标识，用于按照监管产品类别解释和汇总存款流动性余额。

required_fields.name: 存款余额
required_fields.description: 需求需要存款余额，用于作为流动性稳定资金和受保存款计算的基础金额。

required_fields.name: 存款币种
required_fields.description: 需求需要存款币种，用于说明存款余额的计价币种并支持币种维度汇总。

required_fields.name: 流动性分组
required_fields.description: 需求需要流动性分组，用于按监管流动性桶分类展示存款余额。

controls.name: account_identifier_present
controls.rule: Account identifier must be present for every report line.

controls.name: reporting_date_present
controls.rule: Reporting date must be present for every report line.

required_fields.name: 账户标识
required_fields.description: 需求需要账户标识，用于唯一识别每条存款报送记录并支持账户级对账。

required_fields.name: 报告日期
required_fields.description: 需求需要报告日期，用于确定存款余额和流动性指标所属的监管报告日。

required_fields.description: 需求需要客户标识，用于将存款账户归属到持有该存款的客户或法律实体。

required_fields.name: 产品标识
required_fields.description: 需求需要产品标识，用于按照监管产品类别解释和汇总存款流动性余额。

required_fields.description: 需求需要存款余额，用于作为流动性稳定资金和受保存款计算的基础金额。

required_fields.name: 存款币种
required_fields.description: 需求需要存款币种，用于说明存款余额的计价币种并支持币种维度汇总。

required_fields.name: 流动性分组
required_fields.description: 需求需要流动性分组，用于按监管流动性桶分类展示存款余额。

calculations.name: 稳定资金金额
calculations.description: 需求需要稳定资金金额，用于根据存款余额和适用流失率计算可计入稳定资金的金额。

calculations.name: 受保存款金额
calculations.description: 需求需要受保存款金额，用于展示存款余额中受产品保险限额覆盖的部分。

report_impl.item_23063cbe12.name: 每日存款流动性报表数据逻辑
report_impl.item_23063cbe12.description: 说明每日存款流动性报表字段如何从存款账户余额、客户主数据、产品参数和已准备的报表明细数据中取数、计算并满足监管需求口径；该逻辑不创建或拥有物理表。
report_impl.item_23063cbe12.implements: 存款流动性稳定资金报送需求

field_mappings.name: 账户标识逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 account_id 如何承载账户标识需求，并与存款账户余额源记录保持一致。

field_mappings.name: 报告日期逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 as_of_date 如何承载报告日期需求，并限定账户余额快照所属日期。

field_mappings.name: 客户标识逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 customer_id 如何承载客户标识需求，并对齐客户主数据中的存款持有人。

field_mappings.name: 产品标识逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 product_id 如何承载产品标识需求，并支持与产品参数的监管分类对齐。

field_mappings.name: 存款余额逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 balance_amount 如何承载存款余额需求，并作为稳定资金和受保存款计算基础。

field_mappings.name: 存款币种逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 currency 如何承载存款币种需求，并保持与存款账户余额币种一致。

field_mappings.name: 流动性分组逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 liquidity_bucket 如何承载流动性分组需求，并用于监管分类汇总。

field_mappings.name: 稳定资金金额逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 stable_funding_amount 如何承载稳定资金金额需求，并由存款余额和适用流失率计算得到。

field_mappings.name: 受保存款金额逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 insured_balance_amount 如何承载受保存款金额需求，并按照余额与产品保险限额取较小值。

dialects.expression: COALESCE(deposit_liquidity_report_lines.insured_balance_amount, CASE WHEN deposit_accounts.balance_amount <= deposit_products.insurance_limit_amount THEN deposit_accounts.balance_amount ELSE deposit_products.insurance_limit_amount END)
